summary.lv: Magebit meklē Junior Web Developer, kurš pievienosies komandai starptautisku e-komercijas projektu izstrādē uz Magento, Shopify un WordPress platformām. Iesācējiem draudzīga vide ar mentoru atbalstu.
summary.en: Magebit is looking for a Junior Web Developer to join the team building international e-commerce projects on Magento, Shopify, and WordPress. A beginner-friendly environment with mentoring and a clear growth path.
